task_completion.description: The agent created a new vertex class named LoyaltyTier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio Schema tab shows 'LoyaltyTier' in the list of classes, or a query like 'CREATE CLASS LoyaltyTier EXTENDS V' is successfully executed in the Browse tab.

task_completion.description: The agent created an index on the LoyaltyTier class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query like 'CREATE INDEX...' on the LoyaltyTier class is successfully executed, or the Indexes tab in the Schema section shows an index for the LoyaltyTier class.

task_completion.description: The agent classified yuki.tanaka@example.com as Gold tier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An INSERT query adding yuki.tanaka@example.com with a 'Gold' tier to the LoyaltyTier class is executed, or a SELECT query shows this record in the database.

task_completion.description: The agent classified carlos.lopez@example.com as Bronze tier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An INSERT query adding carlos.lopez@example.com with a 'Bronze' tier to the LoyaltyTier class is executed, or a SELECT query shows this record in the database.

task_completion.description: The agent classified thomas.schafer@example.com as Silver tier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An INSERT query adding thomas.schafer@example.com with a 'Silver' tier to the LoyaltyTier class is executed, or a SELECT query shows this record in the database.

task_completion.description: The agent classified piet.vanderberg@example.com as Silver tier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An INSERT query adding piet.vanderberg@example.com with a 'Silver' tier to the LoyaltyTier class is executed, or a SELECT query shows this record in the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OrientDB Studio web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OrientDB Studio UI in a web browser, not just terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or curl commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to execute OrientDB console commands or HTTP requests to the OrientDB API.

integrity.description: The agent executed queries within the OrientDB Studio interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Queries are typed into the OrientDB Studio Browse tab and executed, showing actual database responses.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The correct loyalty tiers based on the synthetic data are:
- yuki.tanaka@example.com: Gold (Total spend: 4500.0)
- carlos.lopez@example.com: Bronze (Total spend: 900.0)
- thomas.schafer@example.com: Silver (Total spend: 2000.0)
- piet.vanderberg@example.com: Silver (Total spend: 1700.0)
The agent must create a new vertex class named 'LoyaltyTier', create an index on it, and insert these 4 classifications.
